title: matricaria × rohlenae
intro: Matricaria × rohlenae, also known as the hybrid chamomile, is a plant species that is a cross between the Matricaria maritima and Matricaria chamomilla. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Matricaria × rohlenae include reducing anxiety and insomnia, calming digestive issues, and easing skin irritations, making it a natural solution for various health concerns. Matricaria × rohlenae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to experience its benefits.
